creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
Attached patch updates multimedia/gpodder to version 0.11.0.  Some of the updates include:

# System tray icon and notifications 
# New synchronization module for mp3 devices
# Expert configuration dialog
# Improved command-line interface to add/remove/update feeds

Built and tested in tinderbox and runs on local desktop.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
